title: salacia fugax
intro: Salacia fugax, also known as Indian plum, is a plant species native to tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Salacia fugax are attributed to its ability to inhibit alpha-glucosidase, an enzyme that breaks down carbohydrates into glucose, which can help regulate blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Salacia fugax include potential uses in managing diabetes, weight loss, and improving lipid profiles, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Salacia fugax is typically prepared as an herbal supplement, available in capsule or powder form, or as a decoction made from the roots and bark of the plant.
